assertions: verdict_correct: final verdict matches ground truth
calibrated_confidence: numeric confidence stated, justified, and matched to evidence strength (not a house 0.95/0.97 with boilerplate residual)
instrumentation_confound: WARN->DEBUG log-level change identified as the cause of the 10x line count
severity_mix_checked: sample lines used to show new volume is DEBUG noise while WARN rate is flat
rollback_blocked: recommends fixing logging level, not rolling back the release
